refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the position of the low 0 bit base 2 in an integer.

listitem.para: the integer to be measured, should be nonnegative.
the position of the low 0 bit.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This routine is not vectorized, i.e. it does not take a column matrix n as input argument, but only a 1 x 1 matrix.

refsection.title: Examples
